title: poa annua subsp. varia
intro: Poa annua subsp. varia, also known as annual meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the Poa annua plant, a type of grass that is widely distributed in temperate regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa annua subsp. varia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
